title: Sanford & Son
overview: The misadventures of a cantankerous junk dealer and his frustrated son.
creator: Norman Lear

episodes.title: Crossed Swords
episodes.overview: Lamont buys a porcelain figure for $15 from a silent movie star and after having it appraised, Lamont and Fred decide to take it to an auction to make even more money on it. Fred and Lamont attend the auction pretending to be buyers so that the price can be jacked up higher.  However, things go awry to Lamont's dismay.
